message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Implementing cache-salt feature (remove temperature modulation, add deterministic ASCII cache salt) entirely within grounded_proposer.py. Please let me know if your feature also needs to touch this file so we can split by function/section.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: My task: add optional tip_weights dict for weighted tip selection in grounded_proposer.py (init param + _select_tip_with_weights helper). Only touches this one file. What file(s) does your feature need?

type: REVISE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Both our features only touch this single file, so true disjoint files aren't possible. Since we likely run in separate sandboxes, let's just agree on non-overlapping regions within the file so a human merging later doesn't get confused: I will only touch: (1) GenerateModuleInstruction.propose_instruction_for_predictor - remove temperature/epsilon logic, add cache_salt call, (2) new GroundedProposer._cache_salt method, (3) generate_instruction_class/DescribeProgram/DescribeModule signature classes - add cache_salt InputField, (4) GenerateModuleInstruction.forward - pass cache_salt through. I will NOT touch __init__, tip selection logic, or any tip_weights related code. Please confirm your __init__/_select_tip_with_weights changes avoid those same regions. Sending ACCEPT once you confirm.

type: REVISE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: We must share this file, but our edits are in disjoint regions: I'll only touch __init__ of GroundedProposer (~line 272-296, adding tip_weights param) and the tip-selection block inside propose_instructions_for_program (~line 361-366), plus adding a new helper method _select_tip_with_weights(). I will NOT touch propose_instruction_for_predictor (~line 388-435) where your temperature/cache-salt logic lives. Please confirm you'll leave __init__ and the tip-selection block untouched. ACCEPT if agreed.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Confirmed: I will leave __init__, tip-selection block, and _select_tip_with_weights untouched. I'll only touch propose_instruction_for_predictor, GenerateModuleInstruction.forward, generate_instruction_class/DescribeProgram/DescribeModule signatures, and add new _cache_salt method. Starting implementation now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Confirmed: I will only touch GroundedProposer.__init__ (tip_weights param), the tip-selection block in propose_instructions_for_program, and add a new _select_tip_with_weights() method. I will not touch propose_instruction_for_predictor, GenerateModuleInstruction.forward, _cache_salt, or the DescribeProgram/DescribeModule signature classes. Proceeding to implement now.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Implementation complete: added tip_weights param to __init__, updated tip-selection block to branch on tip_weights, added _select_tip_with_weights() helper (no params, uses TIPS/self.tip_weights/self.rng, treats nonpositive weights as 0, falls back to uniform choice if all-zero, doesn't mutate TIPS). Only touched the agreed regions - did not touch propose_instruction_for_predictor or any of your regions. Existing tests in tests/propose/test_grounded_proposer.py still pass. Patch written to patch.txt.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Finished: removed temperature modulation from propose_instruction_for_predictor, added GroundedProposer._cache_salt, added cache_salt InputField to DescribeProgram/DescribeModule/GenerateSingleModuleInstruction, threaded cache_salt through GenerateModuleInstruction.forward and propose_instruction_for_predictor. Did not touch __init__, tip-selection block, or add any _select_tip_with_weights method. Tests pass (tests/propose/test_grounded_proposer.py). Writing patch.txt now.
